ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount
%cTried to unmount a component that was not mounted
https://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount
ast.target: %c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount\n%c尝试卸载一个未挂载的组件\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] select_multiple_invalid_value
%cThe \`value\` property of a \`<select multiple>\` element should be an array, but it received a non-array value. The selection will be kept as is.
https://svelte.dev/e/select_multiple_invalid_value
ast.target: %c[svelte] select_multiple_invalid_value\n%c`<select multiple>` 元素的 `value` 属性应为数组，但收到了非数组值。选择将保持原样。\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/select_multiple_invalid_value

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount
%cTried to unmount a state proxy, rather than a component
https://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount
ast.target: %c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount\n%c尝试卸载一个状态代理，而不是组件\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop
%cA \`<svelte:boundary>\` \`reset\` function only resets the boundary the first time it is called
https://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop
ast.target: %c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop\n%c`<svelte:boundary>` 的 `reset` 函数仅在首次调用时重置边界\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop

ast.name: description
ast.target: 标准的乐于助人的 AI 助手

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specialized in programming and software architecture
ast.target: 专注于编程和软件架构

ast.name: description
ast.source: Meta-schema for $data reference (JSON AnySchema extension proposal)
ast.target: 用于 $data 引用的元模式（JSON AnySchema 扩展提案）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creates a new markdown note at the specified path. If content is provided, it writes it to the file.
ast.target: 在指定路径创建一个新的 Markdown 笔记。如果提供了内容，会将其写入文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Full path to the new note (e.g., "Folder/My Note.md")
ast.target: 新笔记的完整路径（例如，“文件夹/我的笔记.md”）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Appends text to the end of an existing note.
ast.target: 将文本追加到现有笔记的末尾。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reads the content of a note.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path of the note to read

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lists files and folders within a specific directory.
ast.target: 列出特定目录内的文件和文件夹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path to the folder (use "/" for root)
ast.target: 文件夹路径（使用“/”表示根目录）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Searches the web for up-to-date information on a given topic.
ast.target: 在网络上搜索有关给定主题的最新信息。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fetches the transcript/captions for a YouTube video URL.
ast.target: 获取 YouTube 视频 URL 的字幕/说明。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 完整的 YouTube 视频 URL

ast.name: description
ast.source: Edits a markdown note. Replaces exactly old_text with new_text. When auto-apply is enabled, changes are applied directly. Otherwise, shows a diff to the user for approval.
ast.target: 编辑 Markdown 笔记。精确地将 old_text 替换为 new_text。当启用自动应用时，更改将直接应用。否则，会向用户显示差异以供批准。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Full path to the note (e.g., "Folder/My Note.md")
ast.target: 笔记的完整路径（例如，“文件夹/我的笔记.md”）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The exact text block to replace

ast.name: description
ast.source: The new text to insert instead

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reads and extracts text content from a PDF file in the vault.
ast.target: 读取并提取保险库中 PDF 文件的文本内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path to the PDF file in the vault
ast.target: 保险库中 PDF 文件的路径

ast.name: description
ast.source: Saves a vault-wide preference to global memory. Prefer save_persona_memory for persona-specific facts, mistakes, and preferences. Use when the user says "remember this" for something that applies across all personas.
ast.target: 将保险库范围内的偏好保存到全局记忆。对于角色特定的事实、错误和偏好，建议使用 save_persona_memory。当用户说“记住这个”且适用于所有角色时使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The preference or instruction to remember

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lists saved global vault memories (not persona memory).
ast.target: 列出已保存的全局保险库记忆（非角色记忆）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Deletes a global vault memory when the user says "forget" and refers to a global preference. Pass id prefix or matching text.
ast.target: 当用户说“忘记”并提及全局偏好时，删除全局保险库记忆。传递 ID 前缀或匹配的文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Memory id prefix or text that appears in the entry to delete
ast.target: 要删除的记忆 ID 前缀或条目中出现的文本

ast.name: description
ast.source: Searches the vault for notes modified within a specific date range. Useful for queries like "what did I write last week?" or "find recent notes about X".
ast.target: 搜索保险库中在特定日期范围内修改过的笔记。适用于查询，如“我上周写了什么？”或“查找关于 X 的近期笔记”。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The search query (what to look for)
ast.target: 搜索查询（要查找的内容）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Natural language time range like "today", "yesterday", "last week", "last month", "last 3 days", "past 7 days"
ast.target: 自然语言时间范围，如“今天”、“昨天”、“上周”、“上个月”、“过去3天”、“过去7天”

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fetches content from any URL (YouTube video, blog post, article, podcast) and returns a structured summary with key points. Works best with YouTube videos that have captions and articles with readable text.
ast.target: 从任何 URL（YouTube 视频、博客文章、文章、播客）获取内容，并返回包含要点的结构化摘要。最适合带有字幕的 YouTube 视频和具有可读文本的文章。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The URL to summarize (YouTube, podcast, article, etc.)
ast.target: 要摘要的 URL（YouTube、播客、文章等）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Level of detail for the summary. Default: brief
ast.target: 摘要的详细程度。默认：简要

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lists enabled agentic skills with their names and descriptions. Disabled skills are omitted. Call this first to discover which skills you can use.
ast.target: 列出已启用的代理技能及其名称和描述。已禁用的技能将被省略。首先调用此函数以发现可以使用哪些技能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Loads a specific agentic skill by name and returns its full instructions. Use this to activate specialized expertise for a task. Call list_skills first if you are unsure which skill to use.
ast.target: 按名称加载特定的代理技能并返回其完整说明。使用此功能为任务激活专业知识。如果不确定使用哪个技能，请先调用 list_skills。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The name of the skill to load (e.g., "deep-research", "content-creator", "interview-prep")
ast.target: 要加载的技能名称（例如，“深度研究”、“内容创作者”、“面试准备”）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Brief description of what you want to accomplish with this skill
ast.target: 关于使用此技能要完成什么的简要描述

ast.name: description
ast.source: Saves a fact, mistake, or preference to this persona's persistent memory file. Use on corrections (mistake), "remember this" (fact/preference), and recurring workflow rules. Do not ask permission.
ast.target: 将事实、错误或偏好保存到此角色的持久记忆文件中。用于更正（错误）、“记住这个”（事实/偏好）和重复的工作流规则。无需请求许可。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The memory content to save. For mistakes use: Wrong: … → Correct: …
ast.target: 要保存的记忆内容。对于错误，请使用：错误：… → 正确：…

ast.name: description
ast.source: Category: fact (about the user), mistake (lesson learned), or preference (how user wants things done)
ast.target: 类别：事实（关于用户）、错误（吸取的教训）或偏好（用户希望如何完成事情）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Removes an entry from this persona's memory when the user says "forget that", "remove that memory", or "don't remember \u2026". Match by text contained in the bullet.
ast.target: 当用户说“忘记那个”、“删除那个记忆”或“不要记住…”时，从此角色的记忆中删除一个条目。通过项目符号中包含的文本进行匹配。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Text that identifies the memory entry to remove
ast.target: 标识要删除的记忆条目的文本

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional: limit search to one section
ast.target: 可选：将搜索限制在一个部分

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lists this persona's saved facts, mistakes, and preferences from memory.md.
ast.target: 列出此角色从 memory.md 中保存的事实、错误和偏好。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand to record a mistake you made and the correct approach. Call this when the user corrects you.
ast.target: 记录你所犯错误和正确方法的简写。当用户纠正你时调用此函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: What went wrong and the correct approach
ast.target: 出了什么问题以及正确的方法

ast.name: description
ast.source: Saves a URL summary as an Obsidian note with proper YAML frontmatter metadata (source, type, date, tags).
ast.target: 将 URL 摘要保存为 Obsidian 笔记，并带有适当的 YAML 前置元数据（来源、类型、日期、标签）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target folder path (e.g., "00_Inbox" or "Resources/Summaries"). Defaults to root.
ast.target: 目标文件夹路径（例如，“00_Inbox”或“资源/摘要”）。默认为根目录。

ast.name: message
ast.source: must be equal to one of the allowed values

ast.name: message
ast.source: must match a schema in anyOf
ast.target: 必须匹配 anyOf 中的一个模式

ast.name: message
ast.source: must match exactly one schema in oneOf
ast.target: 必须精确匹配 oneOf 中的一个模式

ast.name: message
ast.target: 无效的 Base64 字符串

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将选区添加到聊天上下文

ast.name: name
ast.target: 打开 AI 副驾驶聊天
